_chevron\_right_

## About this game

_arrow\_forward_

The enemy army is coming! The world is in danger, and only you can stop the invaders. Gather a team of elite agents, pump up their skills to the maximum and fight back against ruthless enemies!

Assemble your team. Unlock dozens of unique agents, each with their own abilities and specializations.

Upgrade your agents' characteristics, unlock new skills and create an invincible team.

Fight hordes of diverse enemies, each with their own strengths and weaknesses.

Test yourself in battles with powerful bosses with unique abilities and destructive power.

With each level, the enemies become stronger and more dangerous. Be ready for the real challenge!

Use boosts to temporarily strengthen your agents and turn the tide of battle.

Protect the world from invasion!

Updated on

Apr 4, 2026

Available on

Android, [Windows*](https://play.google.com/pc-store/games/details?id=com.MEMOLOGIYA.ToiletCompany)

Action[](https://play.google.com/store/apps/category/GAME_ACTION)

*Powered by Intel® technology

## Data safety

_arrow\_forward_[](https://play.google.com/store/apps/datasafety?id=com.MEMOLOGIYA.ToiletCompany)

Safety starts with understanding how developers collect and share your data. Data privacy and security practices may vary based on your use, region, and age. The developer provided this information and may update it over time.

![Image 14: Icon image](https://play-lh.googleusercontent.com/iFstqoxDElUVv4T3KxkxP3OTcuFvWF5ZQQjT7aIxy4n2uaVigCCykxeG6EZV9FQ10X1itPj1oORm=s20-rw)

This app may share these data types with third parties

Financial info, App activity and 2 others

![Image 15: Icon image](https://play-lh.googleusercontent.com/12USW7aflgz466ifDehKTnMoAep_VHxDmKJ6jEBoDZWCSefOC-ThRX14Mqe0r8KF9XCzrpMqJts=s20-rw)

No data collected

[Learn more](https://support.google.com/googleplay?p=data-safety&hl=en) about how developers declare collection

![Image 16: Icon image](https://play-lh.googleusercontent.com/neRBP16KYqhC7f1N3vUT1Q_HMLwAw7vXu8aOWOqvlY3JXNGd8qyXVNyAQyNLpdUdCV0kYEs9BXk=s20-rw)

Data isn’t encrypted

![Image 17: Icon image](https://play-lh.googleusercontent.com/ohRyQRA9rNfhp7xLW0MtW1soD8SEX45Oec7MyH3FaxtukWUG_6GKVpvh3JiugzryLi7Bia02HPw=s20-rw)

You can request that data be deleted

See details[](https://play.google.com/store/apps/datasafety?id=com.MEMOLOGIYA.ToiletCompany)

_more\_vert_

*   Flag inappropriate
*   Show review history

March 10, 2025

Overall, this is one of the better games made in 2024. However, the controls could be improved on mobile devices since the inability to move while attacking causes the toilets to bite you more often than on the computer versions. Note: I highly recommend listening to Sabaton while playing.

185 people found this review helpful

Did you find this helpful?

Yes

No

## What’s new

- Added a new event: collect titanium fragments and get a new character!

- General optimization and bug fixes.
